content.rendered:
Liberty Global is the world’s largest international TV and broadband company with operations in more than 30 countries across Europe. They invest in the infrastructure that empowers their customers to make the most of the digital revolution.

The Art of Light was involved creating the light designs for seminar events Liberty Global Technology Summit 2016 and -2017, in consultation with NEOC (NEOC.net).

A UNIQUE SETTING

André Beekmans was the lighting operator for the latest Techsummit, Liberty Global Technology Summit 2017. The lighting was a great mixture between show and entertainment. However, the focus for the lighting was on the speakers and their presentations. The Techsummit features industry-leading speakers, hands-on product demos and immersive breakout sessions.

The stage (or stages) was quite unique. Two stages, back-to-back, formed one stage with two different purposes. One side was for the speakers and audience, the other for entertainment in the form of an acrobatic act and a DJ.

Liberty Global Technology Summit 2016

For the Techsummit in 2016, André was the lighting operator as well. For entertainment there was a performance by Flying Drummers. A contrast – of speakers and Flying Drummers – that was made clear using spectacular lighting. The combination of the many LED-strips and décor, and overall light design, took the seminar to the next level.
